title: Carpetlogging
description: Allows almost every non solid block to be covered with carpets in a dynamic way !
body:
<div align="center">

## **Carpetlogging**
---
<div align="center">

## <ins>**About**</ins>

<div align="left">
  
Carpetlogging as the name suggests adds carpetlogging to the game not just to slabs and stairs but a plethora of blocks present in the game allowing you to decorate your interiors like never before ! 

![All the stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4ea8692f8d78dbc11fd058e294d8b20b3701b39.png)
![Mansion but good](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/843494b2194cb4bc585e12b14b98cb03e7a14f4c_0.webp)

<div align="center">

## <ins>**🖥️ For Mod developers 💻**</ins>

<div align="left">
  
To implement supporting for carpetlogging into your block read about it on the mod's wiki.
